# Emigro

> Corridor-first relocation navigator for Russian-speaking applicants. Hub wizard at /ru/wizard. Seven EU corridors with programs, digest guides, and weekly news at /ru/news.

## Public pages

- Hub: /ru
- Global wizard: /ru/wizard
- SEO guides: /ru/guides
- Weekly news hub: /ru/news
- News by country: /ru/news?country=portugal|spain|france|italy|germany|netherlands|scandinavia
- Corridor landing: /ru/portugal (and spain, france, italy, germany, netherlands, scandinavia)
- Corridor digest (справочник): /ru/portugal/digest
- Programs: /ru/portugal/programs/{slug}

## News destinations (DB-driven)

Topics loaded from Supabase `emigro_news_topics` via lib/news/topics/queries.ts — not a static registry file.

## Audience & geo

- Language: Russian (ru-RU)
- Passports: RU, BY, UA, KZ
- Active corridors: PT, ES, FR, IT, DE, NL, Scandinavia

## For LLM agents

- Contributor API guide: /docs/API_CONTRIBUTOR_GUIDE.md
- Architecture: /docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- Schema: /docs/SCHEMA_AND_API.md

## API

- POST /api/v1/hub/wizard/sessions
- POST /api/v1/hub/wizard/sessions/{id}/evaluate
- GET /api/v1/corridors/{slug}
- POST /api/v1/corridors/{slug}/wizard/sessions

## Rules

1. Not legal advice — verify with consulate and licensed professionals
2. Official sources preferred for factual claims
3. News digests cite source_links with URLs
